text:
--liOOAslEiF7prFVr
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
 Content-Disposition: inline
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 On Fri, Mar 23, 2001 at 12:39:34PM -0300, ext Mario Sergio Fujikawa Ferreir=
 a wrote:
 > Hi,
 >=20
 > 	Your problem report about the gnupg-idea
 > is pending feedback. Could you please verify if the
 > problem still occurs? Or, provide additional information
 > as to how to reproduce it?
 
 coat# cd /usr/ports/security/gnupg-idea
 coat# make distclean
 =3D=3D=3D>  Cleaning for gnupg-1.0.4_3
 =3D=3D=3D>  Cleaning for gnupg-idea-1.0.1
 =3D=3D=3D>  Deleting distfiles for gnupg-idea-1.0.1
 coat# pkg_info -aI | grep gnupg
 coat# make install
 >> idea.c doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/gnupg-idea.
 >> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.gnupg.org/pub/gcrypt/contrib/.
 Receiving idea.c (15986 bytes): 100%
 15986 bytes transferred in 0.2 seconds (90.17 kBps)
 >> rsa.c doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/gnupg-idea.
 >> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.gnupg.org/pub/gcrypt/contrib/.
 Receiving rsa.c (14834 bytes): 100%
 14834 bytes transferred in 0.2 seconds (86.05 kBps)
 =3D=3D=3D>  Extracting for gnupg-idea-1.0.1
 >> Checksum mismatch for gnupg-idea/idea.c.
 >> Checksum mismatch for gnupg-idea/rsa.c.
 Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/ports/security/gnupg-idea/di=
 stinfo)
 are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
 check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=3Dyes [other args]".
 *** Error code 1
 
 Stop in /usr/ports/security/gnupg-idea.
 *** Error code 1
 =2E..
 Stop in /usr/ports/security/gnupg-idea.
 *** Error code 1
 
 Stop in /usr/ports/security/gnupg-idea.
 coat#=20
 coat# cd ../gnupg
 coat# make install
 =3D=3D=3D>  Extracting for gnupg-1.0.4_3
 >> Checksum OK for gnupg-1.0.4.tar.gz.
 >> Checksum OK for gnupg-1.0.4.security-patch1.diff.
 =2E..
 =3D=3D=3D>   Compressing manual pages for gnupg-1.0.4_3
 =3D=3D=3D>   Registering installation for gnupg-1.0.4_3
 coat# cd ../gnupg-idea
 coat# make NO_CHECKSUM=3Dyes
 =3D=3D=3D>  Extracting for gnupg-idea-1.0.1
 
 ---------------------------------------------------
 
 IDEA:
 	Patented in the USA and many european countries,
 	and a patent for Japan is pending.  The patent holder
 	Ascom grants a non-commerical license for no charge,
 	but the definition of non-commercial use is rather
 	strict.  You need to buy a license if you want to use
 	IDEA commercially.
 
 	See: http://www.media-crypt.com/pages/fidea.html
 
 RSA:	rsa is now included in gnupg >=3D 1.0.3
 	still included for demonstration.
 
 ---------------------------------------------------
 
 =3D=3D=3D>  Patching for gnupg-idea-1.0.1
 =3D=3D=3D>  Applying extra patch idea.c
 2 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to idea.c.rej
 *** Error code 2
 
 Stop in /usr/ports/security/gnupg-idea.
 *** Error code 1
 
 > 	Unfortunaly, I can't reproduce the problem.
 > It works fine here. Did you try Jedgar's suggestion?
 > 	Can I close the PR?
 > http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D25838
 
 Even if I remove ftp.gnupg.org from MASTER_SITES and fetch the files
 from ftp://core.ring.gr.jp/pub/net/gnupg/contrib/, I still get file
 mismatch and "make NO_CHECKSUM=3Dyes" will fail in 2 out of 3 hunks. So
 I think that its still valid problem report.
 
 P.S. coat and shoes are both 4.2 release (!=3D stable) machines, in case
      that makes any difference.
 
 --
 Juha Ylitalo     juha.o.ylitalo@nokia.com                <work e-mail>
 SaPo B4, 4957    http://10.64.13.22/~jylitalo            <work www>
 +358 40 562 6152 http://www.iki.fi/~jylitalo             <public www>
 "Some tools are used, because its policy, others because they are good."
 
 --liOOAslEiF7prFVr
